phases.effort_reason: focused characterization work on a small module and its tests
phases.name: lock-git-behavior
phases.precondition: This migration is at its first executable phase, and `src/continuous_refactoring/git.py` still exposes the current public helpers listed in its `__all__` for downstream callers and package-root re-export.

phases.effort_reason: in-place helper reordering and local cleanup only
phases.name: reorganize-domain-flow
phases.precondition: Phase 1 is marked complete, and `tests/test_git.py` already contains characterization coverage for `run_command()`, workspace status helpers, clean-worktree enforcement, destructive reset helpers, and commit/revert flows.

phases.effort_reason: localized boundary cleanup with narrow downstream verification
phases.name: tighten-error-boundaries
phases.precondition: Phase 2 is marked complete, and `run_command()` is still the subprocess entry point used by the public git helpers touched by this migration.

phases.effort_reason: final cleanup is limited to transitional private helpers and
phases.name: trim-helper-shapes-and-verify-surface
phases.precondition: Phase 3 is marked complete, and the public symbol set in `src/continuous_refactoring/git.py::__all__` still matches the surface this migration is preserving.
